name: Matsumoto Shave Ice
tagline: The North Shore icon since 1951 — the rainbow combo is non-negotiable.
mustOrder: azuki beans + ice cream on the bottom
parking: Street parking — fills fast on weekends
talkStory: The original wooden building and vintage sign are historic landmarks. Open since 1951. The T-shirt they sell ($15–20) is a legit souvenir.
insiderTips: If the line is insane, walk 50 feet to Aoki's instead. ALWAYS add azuki beans + ice cream on the bottom ($1–2 extra) — that's the real order. Lines can hit 30+ min on weekends so go early or late.
